PROJECT SHOWCASE

Squad Hub

Squad Hub is a comprehensive soccer team management application designed to streamline the organization of matches, player statistics, and team finances. It offers an intuitive interface for coaches and team managers.

Tech Stack: .NET 10 (target framework), .NET MAUI for cross-platform UI (XAML + C#)
